patch_description:
Proposes a more parameter-efficient and symmetry-exploiting ANSATZ_SPEC by:
- replacing the outer ring entanglement from CRZ to CRX (ring of controlled RX gates) with a single shared ring parameter.
- switching the hub-to-center entanglement to CRY gates with a single shared parameter across all hub edges.
- preserving pre/post single-qubit rotations and data re-uploading structure, which maintains the same input/output behavior while reducing the per-block parameter count from 13 to 11.
This design aims to improve generalization and train efficiency (lower total parameter count) without changing the data flow or training loop.
